text.title: The Mom Test Decision Tree
text.summary: Routes by call stage and signal type to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: rewrite future-hypothetical questions before the call
add the current-spend question; it is the highest-signal probe
invalidate call; reschedule with stricter listening discipline
apply ladder classifier; signal = commitment_count, not compliments

text.example: stage=pre-call → all_past_or_current=true → has_spend_q=true → conclusion about-their-life → run interview; post-call classifier returns commitment_count=2, decision = continue discovery.
